title: フェブラリーSの後に・成龍の証し

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The leader of the pack isn't Hokko Tarumae, nor
is it Wonder Acute! She can't be held back! Not
by anyone!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey crosses the finish line in first
place! Flipping the power balance in the senior
year dirt races on its head!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... YEAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I wooon! After everything I had to overcome...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I made it, and I did it with the power of feng
shui! ☆ Did you all see that?!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
What's going on?! This is the February Stakes! If
she's capable of winning here...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, then the power of feng shui... it might
actually be the real deal. I know it was a fad last
summer, but I was still kinda skeptical...

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
It looks like dirt races might become the
battleground between Hokko Tarumae, Wonder
Acute, and Copano Rickey from here on out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her triumphant victory leaves no doubt in my
mind—this is the dawn of a new era.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Tarumae!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Oh, Rickey...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey flies straight over to where Hokko
Tarumae is. She wants to speak with her no matter
what.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I just wanted to ask if I got across to you. Even if
only by a little. And I don't mean about feng shui.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I mean about me. And how I'm taking this
seriously, in my own way.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Rickey...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I know you might not believe in feng shui,
Tarumae. And that there are others out there that
don't believe either.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But I've seen with my own eyes how it can help
people. How it can cheer them on when they need
it.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Feng shui has the power to make you just that
little bit more cheerful, or just that little bit more
open to others.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And to me, that's everything. I'm willing to
dedicate my entire life to it.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to share feng shui with those
who have lost their way and feel powerless to do
anything on their own.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And I want to use it to help people back onto
their feet when they're down.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm not expecting everyone to believe in it. Not
even you, Tarumae. But...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I believe in it! I believe it's something really important!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Believe... You believe, huh?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: I get it, Rickey...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: You believe... just like me.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Like you? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae purses her lips as if remembering
something. And then...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I've met a lot of people who didn't understand my
feelings too.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
No matter how much I told them I was doing this
for Tomakomai, they would say it was pointless.
That this is an individual sport.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
But I never saw it that way. If that were the case, I
wouldn't be able to run at all!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I know, down to the bottom of my heart, that my
victories can be the first steps towards making
the people in my hometown happier. That's why...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Tarumae...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Watching you run today, I realized how similar we
are, Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Although your beliefs are different, you're just as
serious about them as I am. I don't really get feng
shui, but...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: I acknowledge you, Rickey. I acknowledge and admire you as the amazing racer you are.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: ...Tarumae!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two lock eyes and exchange a quiet nod. Just
like that, the rift between them finally vanishes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Through mutual recognition, a new bond is
forged. Thus, the next chapter of Copano
Rickey's senior year begins.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Tarumae. I don't think today's race settled our
rivalry. That goes for Acute, too.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So let's face off again at the next G1 dirt race!
Let's see, that would be...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: The Kashiwa Kinen in May!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
The Kashiwa Kinen? That's the race held in
Funabashi. I won it last year.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! I'm counting on you to face me as last
year's champion.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: I see. Well, if you're going to enter...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Maybe I'll give it a miss.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: What?! Why?!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Just kidding. Hehe. There's no way I'd drop out
just to avoid you. It's just...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I got this feeling during today's race. It's telling
me that unless I switch things up, I won't be able
to keep winning against you.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
You'll just keep getting better and better. I'm
sure of it. Which means...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I have to work even harder than last year! So, I
might not be able to enter the Kashiwa Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Work... even harder than last year? Then, where
are you thinking of running?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae remains quiet. In place of a
response, a warm smile spreads across her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That evening...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer? Is it okay if we aim for the Kashiwa
Kinen for our next race?
choice_data_list: Sure. That's probably our best choice.
Sure. That's probably our best choice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After seeing her performance today, I know she
won't have a problem taking on G1 races,
whether Hokko Tarumae is there or not.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what Tarumae is planning? She said she
wanted to work harder than she did last year,
but...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
There aren't any other G1 races around that time,
right? What other options could she take?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's certainly a bit of a puzzle. What was Hokko
Tarumae feeling today? What decision did she
come to?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad that we finally worked out what was
between us. Still...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling that our fates are headed in a
different direction now.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I think, by acknowledging me, Tarumae has
entered a new cycle.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Her qi flow has improved. Maybe by too much. So...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You should probably keep an eye out while we're
preparing for the Kashiwa Kinen, Trainer. All the
stars in the sky are beginning to move.
